title: Vitiated consent
doc_html:
CHAPTER 4.  VICES OF CONSENT

SECTION 1.  ERROR

Art. 1948.  Vitiated consent

Consent may be vitiated by error, fraud, or duress.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
